mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mt_meter_match (id, archive_id, company_id, meter_type, create_by, create_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{entity.id}, id, '21', #{entity.createBy}, NOW() FROM sys_company WHERE code = 'XABL' AND nature = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, is_enabled FROM mt_tc_archive WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY seq, create_time DESC
